query: CHP olağanüstü kurultay çağrı heyeti Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi başvuru karar - latest status as of late June / early July 2026. Has Özgür Özel's team filed the application under Civil Code Art 75 requesting appointment of a 3-person çağrı heyeti to convene a CHP extraordinary congress? Has any court issued a decision?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key finding:

**As of late June / early July 2026, the çağrı heyeti application to the Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi was ANNOUNCED and PREPARED but NOT confirmed as filed, and NO court decision on it had been issued.**

Key points:
- **Trigger:** After the May 21, 2026 İstinaf "mutlak butlan" (absolute nullity) decision, Özel's faction collected **833 delegate signatures**, submitted them to CHP HQ on **June 17, 2026**, and gave leadership a 10-day deadline.
- **The application:** Özel's team announced it would apply to the Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi to have a **çağrı heyeti** (calling committee) appointed, targeting a filing on **Monday, June 29, 2026**.
- **Status:** All sources (June 25–29) use future/planned tense. Odatv's headline ("Başvuru bugün denilmişti ama…") signals the filing was **delayed/pending**. **No confirmed filing and no court ruling** on this specific request appear in available sources.
- **Legal basis nuance:** Media most often cited **Party Statute Art. 48** (not TMK Art. 75 explicitly), though the described mechanism (court-appointed calling committee) matches the TMK Art. 75 procedure. The "3-person" composition wasn't detailed.
- **Caution:** Don't conflate this with an *earlier* rejected application (Tülin Apak, dismissed on procedural/standing grounds) — a separate matter.
- **Deadlines:** July 20 (judicial recess), July 25–26 (contested election-eligibility window claim).

Note: AskNews tools were unavailable (credit limit), so this relied on web search. No indexed reporting from June 30–July 7 confirmed the final outcome — likely a coverage gap rather than confirmation of inaction.

sources.title: CHP'de karar haftası
sources.snippet: Özel's team planned to file to the Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi on June 29, 2026, with 833 delegate signatures, requesting a çağrı heyeti; no court decision issued.

sources.title: Kurultay krizi yargıya taşındı, kulislerde yeni parti sesleri
sources.snippet: Özel faction preparing to take extraordinary congress demand to court this week; 833 vs 820 signature counts; no ruling issued.

sources.title: CHP'de gündem kurultay için 'çağrı heyeti'... Başvuru bugün denilmişti ama...
sources.snippet: Headline indicates the announced filing date passed but the process remained in an uncertain/pending stage.

sources.title: Özgür Özel ekibi çağrı heyeti için yargıya gidiyor
sources.snippet: Süleyman Bülbül: 'We will apply to civil court Monday (June 29), request a calling committee.' Legal basis cited as Party Statute Art. 48; no decision issued.

sources.title: Özel cephesinden yeni adım! Kurultay talebi için Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi hazırlığı
sources.snippet: Filing being prepared for Monday June 29, 2026; 833 notarized signatures submitted June 17; contingent on leadership rejecting the petition.

sources.title: CHP'de kurultay krizi büyüyor! Özel'in ekibi bugün mahkemeye gidiyor
sources.snippet: June 29, 2026 article: Özel's team to file to Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi 'today' with 833 signatures; committee would form if court accepts.

sources.title: İstinaf CHP için yapılan olağanüstü kurultay talebini reddetti
sources.snippet: Earlier separate İstinaf rejection of an extraordinary congress/stopping request — distinct from the June 2026 çağrı heyeti appointment application.

sources.title: Kritik tarih 26 Haziran... Gerekli adımlar atılmazsa 'kurultay talebi' yargıya taşınacak
sources.snippet: June 26 deadline for leadership; if steps not taken, congress demand to be taken to judiciary.

sources.title: CHP Genel Merkezi 'olağan takvim' demişti! Özel kanadı 'çağrı heyeti' isteyecek
sources.snippet: Özel camp to request çağrı heyeti from court while leadership favored ordinary calendar (September).

data_points.metric: Delegate signatures submitted for extraordinary congress demand
Valid signatures counted by Kılıçdaroğlu camp
Originally collected signatures (before İstanbul delegates set aside)
Deadline given to party leadership to call congress
Maximum period to hold extraordinary congress if court accepts çağrı heyeti request
